positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical central composition featuring a majestic celestial fox spirit (kitsune) traversing a stylized mountain ridge at twilight. The fox is rendered in clean, bold linework, giving it a graphic, tattoo-like quality. The background is a geometric blend of cosmic nebulae and ancient, monolithic mountain structures. Incorporate glowing bioluminescent flora, constellations mapped as stylized golden filigree, and crescent moons. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, burnt orange, gold leaf accents, and teal. The style should be a blend of Art Deco celestial map illustration and neo-tribal tattoo art, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Central, highly contrasted silhouette, perfect for a t-shirt print.
negative: blurry, deformed, extra limbs, bad anatomy, lowres, noise, text, watermark, signature, logo, trademark, grainy, photorealistic, 3d render, cropped, bokeh
